test_cases.name: TC01 - Happy Path: Fonts served from local origin on all Egypt stylewebs

steps.action: Open each Egypt stylweb in Chrome with DevTools > Network tab, filter by 'font', and hard-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to clear cache.
steps.data:
Stylewebs to check: egypt1, egyptseo, egyptseo2, egyptseo3, traveleg, ontrailvisauk
Test environment: https://visas-crm.test5.1evis.net
steps.expected_result: All font file requests (woff2, woff, ttf) are served from the same origin as the page (local domain). Zero requests go to fonts.googleapis.com or fonts.gstatic.com.

steps.action: Visually verify text renders with the intended typeface on the landing/home page of each stylweb.
steps.data: Stylewebs: egypt1, egyptseo, egyptseo2, egyptseo3, traveleg, ontrailvisauk
steps.expected_result: Fonts appear correctly styled — no fallback system font (Arial, Times New Roman) is used. Heading and body text match the expected design.

test_cases.name: TC02 - Happy Path: Material Icons served from local origin on all Egypt stylewebs

steps.action: In DevTools > Network tab, filter by 'material' and 'icons'. Open a page that displays icons (form, navbar, CTA buttons) on each Egypt stylweb.
steps.data: Stylewebs: egypt1, egyptseo, egyptseo2, egyptseo3, traveleg, ontrailvisauk
steps.expected_result: Material Icons font files and CSS are served locally. No requests to fonts.googleapis.com/icon, fonts.gstatic.com, or any external icon CDN.

steps.action: Visually verify all icons render their correct glyph (navbar icons, form-field icons, step indicators, CTA buttons).
steps.data: Screens: home, application form steps, payment page
steps.expected_result: All icons display their correct glyph. No missing-glyph squares (□) or literal ligature text (e.g. 'arrow_forward') is visible.

test_cases.name: TC03 - Page source contains no external font references

steps.action: View the HTML source of the entry page for each Egypt stylweb (right-click > View Page Source) and search for font-related external domains.
steps.data:
Terms to search: fonts.googleapis.com, fonts.gstatic.com, cdn.fonts, material-icons CDN
Stylewebs: egypt1, egyptseo, egyptseo2, egyptseo3, traveleg, ontrailvisauk
steps.expected_result: No <link> tags or @import rules point to external font/icon hosts. All @font-face src values use relative or same-origin URLs.

test_cases.name: TC04 - Edge Case: Page renders correctly when external CDN is blocked

steps.action: In DevTools > Network > Block request domain, add fonts.googleapis.com and fonts.gstatic.com. Hard-reload each Egypt stylweb.
steps.data:
Blocked domains: fonts.googleapis.com, fonts.gstatic.com
Stylewebs: egypt1, egyptseo, egyptseo2, egyptseo3, traveleg, ontrailvisauk
steps.expected_result: All pages render fully without layout breaks or fallback fonts. No console errors referencing the blocked hosts. Fonts and icons display as designed.

test_cases.name: TC05 - Regression: Non-Egypt stylewebs are unaffected

steps.action: Open a non-Egypt stylweb (e.g. Malaysia or Vietnam) on the same test environment and check font loading in the Network tab.
steps.expected_result: Font loading behaviour is identical to before this ticket. No broken styles, missing fonts, or unintended external requests introduced.

steps.action: Complete the application form flow on a non-Egypt stylweb and verify visual rendering.
steps.data: Non-Egypt stylweb — landing page through confirmation
steps.expected_result: Full flow renders correctly with no regressions in typography or icons.

test_cases.name: TC06 - Regression: Full Egypt application form flow renders correctly

steps.action: Complete the full VISA application form flow on egypt1 (home → form steps → payment → confirmation).
steps.data:
Stylweb: egypt1 on https://visas-crm.test5.1evis.net
Use src/automation/scripts/application.js to fill test data
steps.expected_result: All form steps render with correct fonts and icons. No visual regressions on labels, headings, buttons, or input fields throughout the flow.

steps.action: Monitor the browser console during the full flow.
steps.expected_result: No 404 errors for font or icon assets. No 'Failed to load resource' warnings. No new JavaScript errors introduced by this change.
